overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a candlelit gothic common room with stone walls and heavy red curtains. The character walks along the ground floor past tables with glowing crystal balls before ascending a curved stone staircase to an upper balcony level.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic common room with divination tables

agents.ego_description: walking along the ground floor perimeter past tables with glowing crystal balls and candles

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone wall forming the interior structure
heavy red drapery with gold trim framing the gothic windows
tall arched window with diamond-patterned glass panes showing dark night outside
round wooden table with glowing crystal ball and candlestick
brass wall-mounted candle holder providing warm illumination
round red velvet seating pouf near the tables
dark wood table with various small objects and candles

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a candlelit gothic common room with stone walls and red velvet curtains framing tall windows. Tables with glowing crystal balls and candles line the path as the character moves along the ground floor toward a curved staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved stone staircase along the wall

events.description: begins ascending the curved stone staircase along the wall

agents.ego_description: climbing the curved stone staircase that winds along the interior wall

entered.detail: winding stone steps with dark wooden edge trim ascending to upper level
dark decorative wall hanging with intricate patterns between the windows

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a curved stone staircase winding along the wall, moving from the ground floor toward the upper balcony. The perspective shifts to show the stone wall now on the right, with ornate tapestries visible on the left as the climb continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper balcony overlooking the common room

events.description: reaches the top of the staircase and turns to overlook the common room
turns left to face the main area, revealing the full view of the lower floor from above

agents.ego_description: reaching the upper balcony and looking back over the railing to observe the candlelit room below

entered.detail: large carved stone pillar with intricate blue and gold patterns marking the stair top
elevated walkway with dark wooden railing overlooking the lower level

segments.scene_description: Having reached the upper balcony, the character turns to overlook the gothic common room from above. The camera reveals a sweeping view of the candlelit tables, red curtains, and stone walls from the elevated perspective, with the ornate column now prominent in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a candlelit gothic common room that transitions from a ground-level exploration to an elevated panoramic view. It begins by gliding past stone walls and red velvet curtains, moving along the ground floor where tables with glowing crystal balls and candles line the path. As the character reaches a curved stone staircase, the camera ascends the winding steps, shifting perspective so that the stone wall remains on the right while ornate tapestries appear on the left. The scene then opens onto an upper balcony, where the camera turns to overlook the entire room from above. This final vantage point reveals a sweeping view of the candlelit tables and red curtains below, with a prominent ornate column framing the foreground.
